name: ⚙️ CONFIG
func:
flow.set('config', {
    units: { p1: 1000, pv: 1, boiler: 1, poolHeat: 1, ev: 1, acLiving: 1, acBureau: 1 },
    maxImportPeak: 2500,
    maxImportDal: 5000,
    maxImportSuperdal: 8000,
    hysteresis: 300,
    minOnTime: 300,
    minOffTime: 180,
    evMinAmps: 6,
    evMaxAmps: 16,
    evWattsPerAmp: 692,
    boilerPower: 2500,
    boilerIdleThreshold: 50,
    boilerDeadlineWinter: 6.5,
    boilerDeadlineSummer: 8.0,
    poolIdlePower: 100,
    poolActivePower: 2000,
    heaterRightPower: 2500,
    heaterTablePower: 4100,
    acLivingPower: 1500,
    acMancavePower: 1000,
    acBureauPower: 1000,
    acSlaapkamerPower: 1000,
    winterSetpointLiving: 21,
    winterSetpointMancave: 17,
    summerCoolThreshold: 25,
    summerTargetTemp: 22,
    enableNotifications: true
});
if (!flow.get('actionLog')) flow.set('actionLog', []);
node.status({fill: 'green', shape: 'dot', text: 'Config v5.1'});
return null;

name: 🔄 Init
🧠 PM v5.1
🔌 EV
🏊 Pool
